falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 at any point in next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: An 81% match to bottom_2024_aug pattern implies a failed breakdown followed by reversal; a close below 4950 would confirm the breakdown succeeded, invalidating the bottom pattern and suggesting continuation lower rather than reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom featured VIX spike-and-collapse; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic is not being absorbed, contradicting the capitulation-then-recovery structure required for the pattern match to resolve correctly

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while SPX is below 5100
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal flight-to-safety bid in bonds alongside equity weakness, indicating macro deterioration rather than the growth-scare-resolution dynamic that produced the August 2024 bottom; the pattern requires rates stabilizing or rising as equities recover

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
